resources.string: Mentions, replies, direct messages, and location sharing
Use your US phone number to get a one-time code.
Enter the 6-digit code we sent you.
One more step: choose your display name.
Check your connection and try again.
No squads yet — create or join one in the Driftd app soon.
No featured events match this filter.
No community events match this filter.
No upcoming events with a map location within %1$d miles. Try increasing the radius, or check back when new events are posted.
Events you\'re going to or interested in will appear here.
Create or join a squad to see squad events.
No official squad events right now.
This event was added to these squads.
Post in a squad you\'re in.
Add or remove this event from squads you manage.
Only squads you own or manage are shown.
Turn on location to see upcoming events near you. Driftd uses straight-line miles, not driving distance.
No events with a map pin within %1$d miles. Try increasing the radius.
No cars in your garage yet.
Tap Garage to add a vehicle.
Choose your marker color on the map.
Automatically check me in when I arrive at events I\'m going to.
Let others see public events you\'re going to on your Driftd profile and web page.
Anyone can see your driving stats on your profile and on the web.
Only Driftd users who share a squad with you can see your driving stats.
Only you can see your driving stats.
Controls short app sounds like sharing notifications.
You won\'t see them in contacts or direct messages. You may still share a squad.
Permanently removes your profile, garage, drives, squads you own, RSVPs, and other data tied to this account. You\'ll be signed out when it\'s done.
This member\'s driving stats are private.
Level up. Unlock tiers. Stand out.
Earn XP from the actions below. Each tier takes more points to reach.
Share location with a squad once per day
Send your first chat message of the day
Check in to a public event (once per event)
Check in to a squad event (once per event)
Someone joins Driftd with your signup invite
Tap to pick which car you drove.
Add which car you drove for this route.
This drive does not include a car yet.
Not enough GPS samples to draw this drive.
Routes save a drive path you can run on the map, share with your squad, or replay on your profile.
Zoom and pan the map. The crosshair marks where the next point will go.
Tap Set Start and Set Finish to place your endpoints. Driftd calculates the path along roads.
Turn markers are added automatically at intersections. Long-press a marker to move it and the route recalculates.
After you set start and finish, Driftd adds checkpoints automatically. You can adjust density or add more anytime.
You can add more points and checkpoints anytime.
Allow Driftd to use your location to open the map centered on you, making it easier to plan a route from where you are.
You can change this anytime in system Settings.
Choose a starting point to begin your route.
Pan and zoom to the area you want to start in.
Choose an ending point and we\'ll create the route for you.
This usually takes just a few seconds.
We added %1$d checkpoints for this route.
Based on route length and complexity.
Tap any point on the map to move it.
Tip: Long press a marker to move or delete it.
Wait for the route to finish updating
Set start and finish to build a route first
Your route is ready. Short routes may have no checkpoints yet — tap + Checkpoint to add one.
Set start and finish, then shape the path along roads.
Choose how many checkpoints fit this route.
Spacing adapts to route length and how twisty the path is.
You can add or move checkpoints anytime in edit mode.
You have unsaved changes to this route.
This removes the point from your route.
Build a new rally, cruise, or drive
Create a route for a drive, rally, or cruise.
This removes the route from your saved routes.
This updates how the drive appears on your profile and in squad chat shares.
This permanently removes the drive from your profile. Shared copies in squad chat will show as deleted.
Only completed drives can be shared
Post in a squad you\'re in.
Share this drive to one squad
Create or join a Squad before sharing this drive to chat.
Add this spot to your saved places.
This updates how the route appears on your profile.
Couldn\'t update the car for this drive.
No one sharing in this squad right now
Join or create a squad to track the group on the map.
People who are currently sharing will appear here.
No location for this person yet.
No live locations for this audience right now.
Shares are active, but pins need coordinates.
Tip: add MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN in Gradle properties for map tiles.
Tap an event to open details
View all events at this venue
This place will be removed from My Places.
Share event to squad or DM
People from your squads who are going will show here.
People from your squads who RSVP will show here.
Automatically check in when you arrive at the event location.
You\'re checked in to this event.
Event details will be posted soon.
Create or join a Squad before posting this event to chat.
You can send public events to people who share a Squad with you.
This venue verifies you are nearby. Allow location when prompted, then tap check in again.
Tap check in during the event window.
Squad data is not on this device yet — pull to refresh.
Pending invite list is only visible to squad admins.
Paste token from SMS or link URL
No squads on this phone yet — create one below, accept an invite above, or join with a token.
Start driving, chatting, and checking into events to populate squad standings.
No events for this squad on your calendar yet.
This event is private to %1$s and will not appear on the public website. If you add an address, we try to place a map pin for check-in (you can still create the event if lookup misses).
Couldn\'t create this event. Try again.
Couldn\'t place a map pin for that address — try a fuller street address.
Post this event in your squad chat so everyone sees it in the conversation.
This won\'t post anywhere publicly. It\'s only visible in your squad chat.
You\'ll lose access to this squad\'s chat, events, grid, and members.
You\'ll lose access to this squad\'s chat, events, grid, and members.
%1$s will be able to manage members and squad settings as an admin.
%1$s will become a regular member and lose admin abilities for this squad.
They\'ll lose access to this squad\'s chat, events, grid, and members.
You must transfer ownership before leaving the squad.
Allow Driftd to use your location so you can share where you are in chat.
You can change this anytime in system Settings.
Couldn\u2019t get your current location. Try again in a moment.
Location access is off. Enable it in Settings to share your location.
This video is too large. Chat videos must be 250MB or smaller.
This video is too long. Chat videos must be 60 seconds or shorter.
This video is too large and too long. Chat videos must be 250MB or smaller and 60 seconds or shorter.
That photo is too large (max 24 MB). Try a different image.
Allow Driftd to save photos in Settings so you can save this image.
Allow Driftd to save videos in Settings so you can save this video.
GIF search isn\u2019t available right now.
Invite friends to join your squad.
For Copy link and SMS signup invites with someone new to Driftd. Search below to invite people already on Driftd anytime.
You\'ll get %1$d more signup invite when you reach %2$s.
You\'ll get %1$d more signup invites when you reach %2$s.
Please wait for the current invite action.
Can\'t find them? Double-check the number and try again.
No matches. Try a name from your contacts or a US phone number.
Could not join the squad. Try again.
No one in your squads matches that name.
You can leave the squad anytime from squad settings.
Share links are disabled in the Pilot.
Driftd uses your location to center the map, record drives, and share your live position when you choose.
Driftd keeps updating your location in the background while a drive is active so route recording, checkpoints, and optional squad live sharing continue when the app is not on screen.
Allow Driftd to keep updating your location in the background while a drive is active so route recording, checkpoints, and optional squad live sharing continue when the app is not on screen.
You can change this anytime in system Settings.
Drive continues — location pauses when the app is in the background until background location is enabled.
Shown while a drive is recording or sharing in the background.
Driftd is updating your location for this drive.
Driftd uses motion activity to distinguish walking from driving in live sharing.
Driftd needs photo access to set your profile picture, shown on the map and in circles.
Driftd can notify you when friends message squads or start sharing locations with you.
Share my rough location (& light drive telemetry)
Pan the map and save the center as a spot, or wait for squad shares.
Sharing will automatically stop after this time.
Keep a route summary in your profile.
Keep a route summary in your profile.
Add a car in Garage to show your brand on the map.
Let squads see your live position on the map.
Drive saved on this device — tap Retry to upload
Join or create a squad to share your location.
You need at least one squad to share on the map.
Select at least one squad before you start sharing.
Location is encrypted in transit (TLS) and only shared with your selected squads.
Not live until driving is detected
Driftd is built to help squads coordinate drives, rallies, and events together.
don’t interact with the app while driving
never use Driftd to encourage reckless behavior
You’re responsible for your own driving decisions while using the app.

Allow Driftd to use your device location to center the map on you, show distances for events and saved places, and share only when you choose.\n\nYou always have full control over when and who you share your location with.
You can change this anytime in system Settings.
Allow Driftd to use your location to show nearby events within your selected distance.
You can change this anytime in system Settings.
Location permission is required to share your location.
Enable location for Driftd in Settings to share.
Your current location will not appear on the map, and Location Sharing cannot be used until location access is enabled.
Enable location for Driftd in Settings to see nearby events within your selected distance.
Location access is required before you can share your location with a squad.
To share your location, enable Physical activity for Driftd in Settings. Driftd uses motion activity to distinguish walking from driving while sharing.
Find people sharing, %1$d friends sharing location
Broadcast your drive and live location to your Squads
Hit the road without a planned route and just drive
You need to be within 500 feet of this route\'s starting point before starting the drive.
Your active drive session will end immediately.
Great run. See you on the next one.
Jump to a saved pin or bookmark the spot under the crosshair.
All squads you own and your data may be deleted. Type %1$s to confirm.
No conversations yet. Tap Edit on this tab to start a message.
We\'ll crop it to fit the garage cards.
Private squads, live maps, events, and real-world driving culture.
Small private groups for the people you actually drive with. Coordinate quickly, stay connected, and know where everyone is without broadcasting to the world.
Talk, plan, and coordinate with the people you roll with.
Squads stay between you and your friends — not the whole internet.
Keep the crew in sync before, during, and after the drive.
The live map helps your crew coordinate in real time — rallies, convoys, meetups, and late-night drives.
Friends who choose to share appear on the map when it matters.
Pin the places you care about so everyone can rally to the same corner.
Start, pause, or stop sharing — the map reflects the moment.
Build your garage with the cars you actually drive — and see what your friends are bringing too.
Photos, nicknames, colors, and details that feel like your build.
The ride that represents you across your profile and the map.
See what the crew is running and discover new favorites.
See upcoming events, RSVP, and check in when your crew actually shows up.
Discover what\'s on the calendar and what\'s worth the drive.
See who\'s going before you roll out.
Let Driftd check you in when you reach the venue during the window.
Driftd rewards participation, activity, and showing up with your crew.
Stay active and climb with a system tuned for drivers, not grind.
From Rookie through Legend — clear ranks, serious energy.
Wear your tier with understated, premium badge art.
See the full-screen intro again anytime.
